name: contained-list
description: Labelled list of rows inside a bordered container

meta.name: ContainedList
meta.description: Labelled list of rows inside a bordered container

props.name: action
props.description: Primary action shown in the component.

whenToUse: Grouping a short set of related rows under a visible heading in a bordered surface
Presenting selectable or navigable rows (settings groups, member lists)
Separating a labelled cluster of items from surrounding page content
whenNotToUse: A long, virtualised data set — use a Table or DataList instead
Plain bulleted prose where the container border adds no meaning — use List

antiPatterns.bad: Putting interactive controls on a plain ContainedListItem div
antiPatterns.good: Use ContainedListItem asChild with a <button> or <a> so the row is keyboard-focusable
antiPatterns.why: A non-interactive div gives no focus or role semantics to assistive tech

related.name: List
related.reason: List is for unbordered prose lists; ContainedList adds a labelled surface

intent.a11yRationale: The container heading labels the ul/li structure; interactive rows must slot a real button or link via asChild so role and focus are native, not faked on a div

flexibility.note: on-page sits inline; disclosed adds a header band for menus and popovers
Rows are always ul/li; do not replace with generic divs
